title: Time planned vs. actual by project
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
Do you know if it is possible to have a timesheet view in Monday ? I would like to see for each month the time planned vs actual by project or by task. 
Thank you 
Corentin

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Do you know if it is possible to have a timesheet view in Monday ? I would like to see for each month the time planned vs actual by project or by task.

Thank you

Corentin

posts.author: okennis (Olivia Kennis)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @corentin.dalfarra – Olivia here from monday.com. I would recommend using a Chart view to pull in two different numbers columns side by side on the x-axis. This would allow you to connect a board/timesheet and see the actual vs. planned time spent. Hope this helps!

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @okennis

Thank you for your help, I will try to display my data with a chart view .

Have a nice day,

Corentin

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
